title: Umami Fluffy Mediterranean Dum Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly date-night dish featuring fluffy dumplings and canned tomatoes in a rich umami sauce for a deliciously savory meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and onion to sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and umami broth. Let it simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened.
Gently add the frozen dumplings to the sauce, making sure they are evenly coated with the sauce.
Cook over medium heat for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the dumplings are fully cooked and tender.
Stir in the chili flakes and thyme leaves. Cook for an additional minute.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
